tagline: Fermented umami pantry for cooks building deeper flavor without shortcuts

collections.name: Ready-to-use koji staples
collections.description: Approachable fermented staples for marinades, broths, grains, vegetables, sauces, and drinks.

products.name: Shio Koji Everyday Jar
products.use_case: Tender grilled proteins and deeply seasoned roasted vegetables
products.description: Salted rice koji for chicken, pork, fish, tofu, mushrooms, and quick vegetable marinades.

products.name: Shoyu Koji Spoon Sauce
products.use_case: Rice bowls, broths, pan sauces, and finishing spoonfuls
products.description: A spoonable shoyu koji condiment that brings soy-sauce depth with fermented roundness.

products.name: Barley Koji Paste
products.use_case: Roasted vegetables, mushrooms, beans, and grain bowls
products.description: A savory barley koji paste for cooks who want deeper vegetable flavor without meat stock.

products.name: Sweet White Miso Crock
products.use_case: Dressings, soups, butter sauces, corn, and desserts
products.description: Mellow white miso for everyday cooking and quiet savory-sweet applications.

products.name: Red Miso Broth Base
products.use_case: Richer soups, broths, beans, and noodle bowls
products.description: A deeper miso staple for soup-and-broth depth packs and slow-tasting weeknight meals.

products.name: Chickpea Miso
products.use_case: Vegetarian weeknight sauces and savory depth
products.description: A chickpea-based miso for vegetable-forward cooking, brothy beans, and dressings.

products.name: Amazake Concentrate
products.use_case: Non-alcoholic drinks, citrus shrubs, smoothies, and low-sugar desserts
products.description: A lightly sweet fermented rice concentrate for beverage and dessert pantry builds.

collections.name: Fermentation foundations
collections.description: Foundational ingredients and guides for small-batch cooks who want reliable koji projects.

products.name: Dried Rice Koji
products.use_case: Homemade shio koji, amazake, pickling beds, and starter batches
products.description: Dried rice koji for cooks ready to make practical fermented staples at home.

products.name: Barley Koji
products.use_case: Savory pastes, vegetable seasonings, and brothy bases
products.description: Barley koji for building a deeper, grain-forward fermented pantry.

products.name: Small Batch Starter Pack
products.use_case: First koji pantry project
products.description: Dried koji, salt blend, brine guide, and safety checklist sized for approachable home batches.

collections.name: Cooking sauces and condiments
collections.description: Fermented condiments for heat, sweetness, finishing, glazing, and fast savory depth.

products.name: Koji Hot Sauce
products.use_case: Eggs, beans, noodles, grilled food, and vegetables
products.description: A fermented hot sauce that brings depth and heat without flattening the food underneath.

products.name: Koji Mustard
products.use_case: Sandwiches, dressings, roasted vegetables, and grilled proteins
products.description: A savory mustard built for pantry cooks who want bright acidity and fermented body.

products.name: Miso Caramel
products.use_case: Desserts, apples, ice cream, cakes, and pantry gifting
products.description: A sweet-salty miso dessert sauce with the quiet complexity of fermentation.

products.name: Tamari-Style Finishing Sauce
products.use_case: Table seasoning, broths, grains, and vegetable bowls
products.description: A deep finishing sauce for cooks who already reach for good soy sauce and vinegar.

products.name: Fermented Garlic Paste
products.use_case: Pan sauces, soups, marinades, beans, and roasted vegetables
products.description: Garlic paste with fermented roundness for faster savory foundations.

collections.name: Meal-oriented bundles
collections.description: Curated kits arranged around cooking outcomes instead of fermentation jargon.

products.name: Grilled Protein Marinade Set
products.use_case: Juicier grilled chicken, pork, fish, and tofu
products.description: Shio koji, glaze base, fermented garlic paste, and marinade timing card.

products.name: Roasted Vegetable Umami Kit
products.use_case: Deeper carrots, squash, mushrooms, greens, and grain bowls
products.description: Barley koji paste, sweet white miso, fermented garlic paste, and a vegetable flavor map.

products.name: Quick Pickle Bed
products.use_case: Faster pickles and crisp everyday sides
products.description: Koji pickling bed, salt blend, brine guide, and timing cards.

products.name: Soup-and-Broth Depth Pack
products.use_case: Richer soups, broths, beans, and noodle bowls
products.description: Red miso, chickpea miso, tamari-style finishing sauce, and broth timing cards.

products.name: Vegetarian Weeknight Flavor Set
products.use_case: Savory depth for vegetable-forward cooking
products.description: Chickpea miso, barley koji paste, tamari-style finishing sauce, and printed flavor map.

collections.name: Beverage and dessert pantry
collections.description: Amazake drink bases, dessert sauces, shrubs, and low-sugar fermented syrups.

products.name: Koji Citrus Shrub Concentrate
products.use_case: Quietly complex non-alcoholic drinks
products.description: A citrus shrub concentrate built around fermented depth and bright acidity.

products.name: Low-Sugar Fermented Syrup
products.use_case: Seltzer, tea, desserts, and hosting drinks
products.description: A low-sugar syrup for drinks and desserts that need body without heaviness.

collections.name: Teaching goods
collections.description: Printed materials focused on everyday cooking, timing, safety, tasting, and use cases.

products.name: Printed Flavor Map
products.use_case: Choosing a ferment by protein, vegetable, grain, broth, drink, or dessert
products.description: A practical map that turns scattered fermented jars into an intentional pantry system.

products.name: Fermentation Timing Cards
products.use_case: Marinades, pickles, miso additions, and amazake drinks
products.description: Small reference cards for reliable timing without treating koji like a science project.

products.name: Safety Checklist
products.use_case: Small-batch starter packs and home fermentation confidence
products.description: A concise checklist for careful pantry projects and fermentation-curious cooks.

products.name: Everyday Koji Recipe Zine
products.use_case: Weeknight recipes and dinner-party hosting
products.description: Recipes for grilled proteins, roasted vegetables, faster pickles, richer soups, drinks, and desserts.
